Data Center Rack Power Distribution Unit Market Report 2033

# Data Center Rack Power Distribution Unit Market (2026 - 2033) Size, Share & Trends Analysis Report By Rack Type (Non-intelligent, Intelligent (Metered, Switched)), By Region (North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Latin America, Middle East & Africa), And Segment Forecasts

- Report ID: GVR-1-68038-830-5
- Number of Report Pages: 120
- Format: PDF

- Historical Range: 2021 - 2025
- Forecast Period: 2026 - 2033
- Industry: Technology

## Data Center Rack Power Distribution Unit Market Summary

The global data center rack power distribution unit market size was estimated at USD 2.81 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 5.87 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 9.7% from 2026 to 2033. The growth of high-performance computing (HPC), artificial intelligence (AI), and GPU-intensive workloads is driving demand for data center rack power distribution unit market.

### Key Market Trends & Insights

- North America held 38.0% revenue share of the global data center rack power distribution unit market.
- In the U.S., the expansion of colocation data centers is accelerating the demand for data center rack power distribution unit market.
- By rack type, non-intelligent segment held the largest revenue share in 2025.

### Market Size & Forecast

- 2025 Market Size: USD 2.81 Billion
- 2033 Projected Market Size: USD 5.87 Billion
- CAGR (2026-2033): 9.7%
- North America: Largest market in 2025
- Asia Pacific: Fastest grow

## Data Center Rack PDU Market Growth & Trends

The global data center rack power distribution unit market size is anticipated to reach USD 5.87 billion by 2033, according to a new report by Grand View Research, Inc. The market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 9.7% from 2026 to 2033. The on-going novel coronavirus pandemic is expected to negatively impact the world’s economy. During this pandemic, data centers are expected to be the key pillars that are holding the markets together since people are advised to stay at home. The Europe data center PDUs and PSUs market is projected to reach $20.05 billion by 2035 from $2.45 billion in 2024, growing at a CAGR of 21.23% during the forecast period 2025-2035. Data centre PDUs and PSUs in Europe cover a wide range of power distribution and supply technologies that are necessary to guarantee dependable and effective data centre operations. The growing need for robust and energy-efficient power solutions to support increased data workloads and digital infrastructure is driving the market's steady growth. Power management in data centres is becoming more scalable, sustainable, and economical thanks to innovations like intelligent PDUs, modular PSUs, and sophisticated real-time monitoring systems.

Eaton, Vertiv, Schneider Electric, Delta Power Solutions, and ABB are among the top suppliers in the European market, and they are all vying to supply next-generation power technology. Growing concerns about operational uptime, carbon footprint reduction, and energy efficiency are changing consumer behaviour and driving more investment in intelligent and flexible power infrastructure. # United Kingdom Rack PDUs Market 2026 Analysis and Forecast to 2035

## Executive Summary

The United Kingdom Rack Power Distribution Unit (PDU) market is a critical component of the nation's digital infrastructure, underpinning the operational integrity of data centres, enterprise IT environments, and edge computing facilities. As of the 2026 analysis period, the market is characterised by a transition from basic power distribution towards intelligent, monitored, and connected solutions that offer granular control, energy efficiency, and enhanced resilience. This evolution is being driven by the relentless growth of data consumption, the formalisation of sustainability mandates, and the architectural shift towards high-density computing.
